name: libhtml-wikiconverter-perl
title: libhtml-wikiconverter-perl
description:
HTML to wiki markup converter
HTML::WikiConverter is an HTML to wiki converter. It can convert HTML
source into a variety of wiki markups, called wiki "dialects".
.
This package contains the core modules. You will need at least one of the
dialect packages for this package to be of any real use.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use html2wiki because HTML to wiki markup converter.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use html2wiki as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `html2wiki [options] [file]` as documented upstream for html2wiki.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `html2wiki --dialect MediaWiki --encoding iso-8859-1 \` as documented upstream for html2wiki.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair html2wiki with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `html2wiki --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.readme: html2wiki - convert HTML into wiki markup
documentation.how_to_use: Install/setup: sudo apt install libhtml-wikiconverter-perl. Run the primary entrypoint as shown in upstream docs, e.g. `html2wiki --dialect MediaWiki --encoding iso-8859-1 \`.
documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'install' phase against surfaces [local] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: HTML to wiki markup converter.
documentation.why_to_use: Prefer this tool based on upstream description: html2wiki - convert HTML into wiki markup.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install libhtml-wikiconverter-perl
